final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing Xiaohongshu (小红书) style 9-grid book cover vertical image for a grassroots/amateur media creator account, featuring the DJI Pocket 4 as the featured product.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu (小红书) "素人" amateur creator aesthetic — warm, casual, slightly over-exposed lifestyle flat-lay or handheld feel, soft grain, approachable and unpolished on purpose, reminiscent of popular 小红书 cover templates
Composition: 9-grid (九宫格) layout structure implied in the cover design, vertical portrait orientation, central title text prominently placed in the middle zone, product DJI Pocket 4 naturally integrated into the visual
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 camera as hero product, held or displayed casually by an amateur creator hand or resting on a lifestyle surface; overall vibe is "real person, real review"
Scene/backdrop: cozy lifestyle backdrop — soft neutral tones, pastel or warm white surface, minimal clutter, feels like a real person's desk or café table
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural window light, warm and inviting, low contrast, approachable mood
Color palette: warm neutrals (cream, warm white, soft beige) as base; one accent color (dusty rose or sage green) to differentiate; product's dark body as visual anchor
Text (verbatim): "大强pocket4初体验"
Constraints: title text "大强pocket4初体验" must be centered, large, and rendered in a cute, playful, differentiated font style (rounded bubbly or hand-lettered feel, not generic system font); 9-grid cover proportion must be respected; text must be legible at thumbnail size
Avoid: overly polished commercial advertising look; studio lighting; dark dramatic shadows; generic tech review aesthetic; stiff symmetry; watermark; stuffer quality words
